description: Even positions share one color, odd positions share the other
Edge cards (1,2,5,6) all outrank interior cards (3,4)
Pos 1&6 share suit, AND pos 2&5 share suit (sandwich mirror)
Endpoints share a suit that no interior card has
Cards form a connected graph via shared rank or suit
Ranks form a mountain (up then down) or valley (down then up)
Ranks decrease at most once (almost sorted ascending)
Same-suit cards appear in ascending rank order by position
Every card has an adjacent card of the same color
Number of suit transitions = number of rank increases
Same rank appears at positions exactly 3 apart
Three consecutive cards share the same suit
Highest and lowest ranked cards share a suit
Lowest-ranked card is at position 3 or 4
Highest-ranked card is at position 1 or 6
All four suits are present in the hand
